<!--
  Thanks for contributing to diffah! A short description of WHY this
  change is needed reads better than a description of WHAT it does
  — reviewers can read the diff for the WHAT.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences explaining the motivation. -->

## What changed

<!-- Bullet list of user-facing or API behavior changes. -->

## Linked issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123, Refs #456. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated and passing locally
- [ ] `make lint` is clean
- [ ] `make test` is clean (and `make test-integration` if I/O changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the relevant `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] `README.md` / `docs/compat.md` / `docs/performance.md` updated
      when behavior they document changes
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
